zh.Sefton, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Molyneux於1340年之前出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，他的父親William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton29歲，母親Joan Elall26歲。他於大約1352年與Jane de Holland在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1372年在英國肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.Sefton, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾澤福頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Molyneux于1340年之前出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓时，他的父亲William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton29岁，母亲Joan Elall26岁。他于大约1352年与Jane de Holland在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1372年在英国肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Molyneux was born before 1340, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, his father, William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton, was 29 and his mother, Joan Elall, was 26. He married Jane de Holland about 1352, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1372, in Canterbury, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Molyneux est né avant 1340, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan Elall, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Jane de Holland environ 1352, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1372, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Molyneux vor 1340 in Sefton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton 29 und seine Mutter Joan Elall 26. Er hat um 1352 in Lancashire, England Jane de Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1372 in Canterbury, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Molyneux è nato il prima del 1340 nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Joan Elall, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Jane de Holland circa 1352, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1372, nel Canterbury, Kent, England.

ja.Canterbury, Kent, England: イギリスケントカンテルブリー
ja.lifeSummary: William Molyneuxが1340年以前にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父William Molyneux I, Lord Of Seftonは29歳，母Joan Elallは26歳であった。約1352年にイギリスランカシュアイアでJane de Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1372年にイギリスケントカンテルブリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Molyneux(이)가 1340년 이전 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Elall(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1352년 영국 랭카실르에서 Jane de Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1372년 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 사망했다.

mn.Sefton, Lancashire, England: Sefton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Molyneux nasceu antes 1340, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan Elall, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane de Holland aproximadamente 1352, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1372, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Molyneux родился перед 1340 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Elall, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane de Holland около 1352 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1372 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

sm.Bef 1340–about 1372: a'e le'I oo le 1340–e tusa o le 1372

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Molyneux nació antes de 1340, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joan Elall, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Jane de Holland aproximadamente 1352, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1372, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.
